amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 15 — paragraph 4 — subparagraph 1
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 15 — paragraph 4 — subparagraph 1

## Text proposed by the Commission

High-risk AI systems shall be resilient as regards attempts by unauthorised third parties to alter their use or performance by exploiting the system vulnerabilities.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

High-risk AI systems shall be resilient as regards to attempts by unauthorised third parties to alter their use , behaviour, outputs or performance by exploiting the system vulnerabilities.
commission_text: High-risk AI systems shall be resilient as regards attempts by unauthorised third parties to alter their use or performance by exploiting the system vulnerabilities.
parliament_text: High-risk AI systems shall be resilient as regards to attempts by unauthorised third parties to alter their use , behaviour, outputs or performance by exploiting the system vulnerabilities.
